number.description: Numeric tower: integer, rational, real, and complex numbers with exact/inexact distinction

boolean.description: Boolean values; only #f is falsy, everything else including 0 and () is truthy

char.description: Unicode character literal with #\ prefix, supports named chars like #\space

string.description: Mutable sequence of characters enclosed in double quotes

symbol.description: Interned identifier used as data, central to symbolic computation and macros

pair.description: Fundamental compound type built with cons, accessed with car and cdr

list.signature: (list a b c) or '(a b c)
list.description: Linked list built from nested pairs terminated by null, the primary data structure

vector.description: Fixed-length array with O(1) indexed access, more efficient than lists for random access

port.description: I/O port for reading from or writing to files and other data sources

procedure.description: First-class function value created with lambda or define

void.description: The void value returned by side-effecting procedures like display and set!
